title: Business loan system — banks, applications, and repayments
changes: New business loan system: any business can become a lender via /businessloanconfig + /businessloanpanel
Appy-style loan application panel — members click Apply, pick Personal or Property, answer a short DM Q&A
Applications are reviewed in a configurable channel with Approve/Deny buttons; approving prompts for an interest rate and issues the loan
Simple interest model: total owed = principal x (1 + rate/100 x days/365), max repayment term is 7 days
New /loanpay command — pay down an active loan (autocomplete lists your loans by lender + balance)
New /loans command — view your own active/paid/defaulted loans, or a staff view of another member's
New /businessloans command — a bank's full loan portfolio with status filters and outstanding totals
New /loanapplications command — fallback list of pending applications for a business
New /loandefault command (staff only) — mark a loan as defaulted
Hourly reminder DM sent to borrowers within 24h of their loan's due date (sent once per loan)
Added 'loan_out' and 'loan_repayment' types to the BusinessTransaction enum
